title: German-Style Corn Fritters
description: Crunchy corn fritters with a hint of citrus, inspired by traditional German cuisine. Serve as a snack or side dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together cornmeal, flour, salt, and pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together yogurt, egg, and citrus zest.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Heat about 1/2-inch (1 cm) of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter into the oil.
Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
